title: Raise the Sea Wall
description: Quarry the headland and ring the harbor in dressed stone. A statement of permanence — and a wall the old families have wanted for a generation.

title: Strike the Grain Tariff
description: Lift the duty on imported grain so the harbor undercuts the chora's farmers. The trading houses cheer; the landed families do not.

title: A Festival in the League's Name
description: Crown the year with games and a procession paid from the common purse — a feast that belongs to no House but to Massalia herself.

title: A Naval Levy
description: Lay down a squadron of triremes in the yards. Massalia's reach is her hulls — and her debts, if the timber runs short.

title: Restore the Founders' Shrine
description: Rebuild the shrine of Protis in fresh marble and lengthen the founders' rite. The gods of the first ships, honored as the old ways demand.

title: A Public Granary
description: Tax this year's surplus into a civic store against a lean harvest. Prudence to the careful; a seizure of honest profit to the bold.

title: Open the Agora to Metics
description: Grant resident foreigners the right to trade under their own names. More silver through the gates — and more strangers behind the wall.

title: An Embassy to the Tin Routes
description: Send envoys north to the tin lords with gifts and guarantees. If the road holds, the dividends flow back to those who sit in council.

title: Civic Games
description: A modest year of footraces and recitations in the agora — cheap glory, and a crowd that remembers who paid for the wine.
